data.body: Investigation complete (bot-psychologist). Root cause: MODERATE+High routing table row in Phase 3 Step 4b bypasses /dso:preplanning, routing directly to /dso:implementation-plan, skipping story decomposition approval. Proposed fix: change MODERATE+High row to /dso:preplanning --lightweight. Confidence: HIGH. Step 3.5: PASS.
